events.title: Hit Single Releases
events.description: Released 'Maanja Nee' achieving widespread critical acclaim.

events.title: Maamannan & Pathu Thala
events.description: Delivered powerful vocal performances in two of the year's biggest movies with tracks 'Veerane' and 'Ninaivirukka'.

events.title: Expanding Indie Projects
events.description: Focused on creating unique independent musical styles and collaborating with various artists.

events.title: Dil Bechara
events.description: Contributed the emotional track 'Never Say Goodbye' to the widely loved film Dil Bechara.

events.title: Sago in Bigil
events.description: Recorded the energetic track 'Sago' for the blockbuster film Bigil, further establishing his presence in the industry.

events.title: Playback Debut
events.description: Made his singing debut in Mani Ratnam's OK Kanmani with the soul-stirring 'Maula Wa Sallim'.
